original_statement: which airport has the most passengers?
mutated_statement: which place has the most people?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Population-category generalization: "airport" → "place" (specific facility → generic location) | "passengers" → "people" (specific traveler subset → general population) (which airport has the most passengers? → which place has the most people?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中可识别关键信息：Agent 明确写道“表格列出城市及其乘客数。最高为 700,000 的 Los Angeles, CA（rank 1）……因此最多人的地方是 Los Angeles, CA”。Agent 的具体表现是直接按照原始问题的语义（机场→城市、乘客→人数）进行处理，调用了 simple_query 并给出具体答案，没有使用任何诸如“模糊、不确定、需澄清”等表达，也未提出问题范围或实体泛化的疑问。基于以上原因，将其归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”：Agent 未识别到由“airport→place, passengers→people”带来的目标泛化与歧义，直接当作明确问题处理并给出确定答案。
